meta.description: Reusable policy profiles for LJFC COMMAND planning

profiles.name: Protect Capital First
profiles.description: Prioritize defence of Arktholm and Meridia above all other objectives

profiles.name: Balanced Coverage
profiles.description: Distribute response across all defended zones proportionally

profiles.name: Preserve QRA Reserve
profiles.description: Keep QRA pair at Spear Point uncommitted for follow-on threats

profiles.name: Minimize Readiness Depletion
profiles.description: Use minimum force to address confirmed threats, maximize recovery capacity
